The role ladder

Fraunces carries display down to subhead; Literata carries body-lg and body; Archivo the captions and data; JetBrains the eyebrow and code.

.tw-body-lg
Literata · opsz 12 · wght 400 · lh 1.6
Besides her hoisted boats, an American whaler is outwardly distinguished by her try-works. It is as if from the open field a brick-kiln were transported to her planks.
.tw-body
Literata · opsz 10 · wght 400 · lh 1.62
There is a wisdom that is woe; but there is a woe that is madness. And there is a Catskill eagle in some souls that can alike dive down into the blackest gorges, and soar out of them again and become invisible in the sunny spaces. And even if he forever flies within the gorge, that gorge is in the mountains.

Archivo · wght 400 · lh 1.45
Archivo holds the captions and small print.
